description: Local-first learning engine for CodeBuddy/WorkBuddy. Start Study Anything locally, call its OpenAPI/local HTTP tools, and export source-bound learning evidence without storing model keys.

privacy_boundaries.real_model_keys: owned by CodeBuddy/WorkBuddy or the user's private Agent
privacy_boundaries.study_anything_stores: local learning state, validation evidence, and redacted audit metadata

tool_contracts.mcp: planned extension; not shipped by this plugin

name: study-anything
